name: fishjam-server-sdk

metadata.name: fishjam-server-sdk
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Python server SDK for the Fishjam Cloud

documentation: # Fishjam Python Server SDK Python server SDK for the [Fishjam Cloud](https://fishjam.io/). Read the docs [here](https://fishjam-cloud.github.io/python-server-sdk) ## Installation ``` pip install fishjam-server-sdk ``` ## Usage The SDK exports two main classes for interacting with Fishjam server: `FishjamClient` and `FishjamNotifier`. `FishjamClient` wraps http REST api calls, while `FishjamNotifier` is responsible for receiving real-time updates from the server. #### FishjamClient Create a `FishjamClient` instance, providing the fishjam server address and api token ```python from fishjam import FishjamClient fishjam_client = FishjamClient(fishjam_url="localhost:5002", management_token="development") ``` You can use it to interact with Fishjam Cloud to manage rooms and peers ```python # Create a room options = RoomOptions(video_codec="h264", webhook_url="http://localhost:5000/webhook") room = fishjam_client.create_room(options=options) # Room(components=[], config=RoomConfig(max_peers=None, video_codec=, webhook_url='http://localhost:5000/webhook'), id='1d905478-ccfc-44d6-a6e7-8ccb1b38d955', peers=[]) # Add peer to the room peer, token = fishjam_client.create_peer(room.id) # Peer(id='b1232c7e-c969-4450-acdf-ea24f3cdd7f6', status=, type='webrtc'), 'M8TUGhj-L11KpyG-2zBPIo' ``` All methods in `FishjamClient` may raise one of the exceptions deriving from `fishjam.errors.HTTPError`. They are defined in `fishjam.errors`. #### FishjamNotifier FishjamNotifier allows for receiving real-time updates from the Fishjam Server. You can read more about notifications in the [Fishjam Docs](https://fishjam-cloud.github.io/fishjam-docs/next/getting_started/notifications). Create `FishjamNotifier` instance ```python from fishjam import FishjamNotifier fishjam_notifier = FishjamNotifier(fishjam_url='localhost:5002', management_token='development') ``` Then define a handler for incoming messages ```python @notifier.on_server_notification def handle_notification(server_notification): print(f'Received a notification: {server_notification}') ``` After that you can start the notifier ```python async def test_notifier(): notifier_task = asyncio.create_task(fishjam_notifier.connect()) # Wait for notifier to be ready to receive messages await fishjam_notifier.wait_ready() # Create a room to trigger a server notification fishjam_client = FishjamClient() fishjam_client.create_room() await notifier_task asyncio.run(test_notifier()) # Received a notification: ServerMessageRoomCreated(room_id='69a3fd1a-6a4d-47bc-ae54-0c72b0d05e29') ``` ## Local development The project is managed using [poetry](https://python-poetry.org/). Make sure to have it installed first. Then install the dependencies ```console poetry install ``` ## Generating protobuf To generate Python protobuf definitions run ```console poetry run ./compile_proto.sh ``` ## Testing You can test the SDK by running ```console poetry run ci_test ``` In local development you can use ```console poetry run local_test ``` ## Format & Lint You can format code by running ```console poetry run format ``` You can check linter by running ```console poetry run lint ``` ## Documentation Documentation is generated via openapi-python-client. To update documentation you need to: - in `poetry_scripts.py` change branch from which openapi.yaml should be downloaded - run `poetry run update-client` ## License Licensed under the [Apache License, Version 2.0](LICENSE) ## Fishjam Cloud is created by Software Mansion Since 2012 [Software Mansion](https://swmansion.com) is a software agency with experience in building web and mobile apps. We are Core React Native Contributors and experts in dealing with all kinds of React Native issues. We can help you build your next dream product – [Hire us](https://swmansion.com/contact/projects?utm_source=fishjam&utm_medium=python-readme). [![Software Mansion](https://logo.swmansion.com/logo?color=white&variant=desktop&width=200&tag=react-client)](https://swmansion.com/contact/projects?utm_source=fishjam&utm_medium=python-readme)

classes.name: fishjam._ws_notifier.FishjamNotifier

methods.name: fishjam._ws_notifier.FishjamNotifier.__init__
documentation: Create FishjamNotifier instance, providing the fishjam url and management token.

methods.name: fishjam._ws_notifier.FishjamNotifier.on_server_notification
documentation: Decorator used for defining handler for Fishjam Notifications

methods.name: fishjam._ws_notifier.FishjamNotifier.connect
documentation:
A coroutine which connects FishjamNotifier to Fishjam and listens for
all incoming messages from the Fishjam.

It runs until the connection isn't closed.

The incoming messages are handled by the functions defined using the
`on_server_notification` decorator.

The handler have to be defined before calling `connect`,
otherwise the messages won't be received.

methods.name: fishjam._ws_notifier.FishjamNotifier.wait_ready
documentation:
Waits until the notifier is connected and authenticated to Fishjam.

If already connected, returns `True` immediately.
Allows for receiving WebSocket messages from Fishjam.

modules.name: fishjam._webhook_notifier
documentation:
Module defining a function allowing decoding received webhook 
notification from fishjam to notification structs.

functions.name: fishjam._webhook_notifier.receive_binary
documentation:
Transform received protobuf notification to adequate notification instance.
The available notifications are listed in `fishjam.events` module.

methods.name: fishjam._openapi_client.client.Client.__aexit__
documentation: Exit a context manager for underlying httpx.AsyncClient (see httpx docs)

A class for keeping track of data related to the API

The following are accepted as keyword arguments and will be used to construct httpx Clients internally:

> `base_url`: The base URL for the API, all requests are made to a relative path to this URL
>
> `cookies`: A dictionary of cookies to be sent with every request
>
> `headers`: A dictionary of headers to be sent with every request
>
> `timeout`: The maximum amount of a time a request can take. API functions will raise
> httpx.TimeoutException if this is exceeded.
>
> `verify_ssl`: Whether or not to verify the SSL certificate of the API server. This should be True in production,
> but can be set to False for testing purposes.
>
> `follow_redirects`: Whether or not to follow redirects. Default value is False.
>
> `httpx_args`: A dictionary of additional arguments to be passed to the `httpx.Client` and `httpx.AsyncClient` constructor.

Attributes:
: raise_on_unexpected_status: Whether or not to raise an errors.UnexpectedStatus if the API returns a

  : status code that was not documented in the source OpenAPI document. Can also be provided as a keyword
    argument to the constructor.

methods.name: fishjam._openapi_client.client.AuthenticatedClient.__aexit__
documentation: Exit a context manager for underlying httpx.AsyncClient (see httpx docs)

A Client which has been authenticated for use on secured endpoints

The following are accepted as keyword arguments and will be used to construct httpx Clients internally:

> `base_url`: The base URL for the API, all requests are made to a relative path to this URL
>
> `cookies`: A dictionary of cookies to be sent with every request
>
> `headers`: A dictionary of headers to be sent with every request
>
> `timeout`: The maximum amount of a time a request can take. API functions will raise
> httpx.TimeoutException if this is exceeded.
>
> `verify_ssl`: Whether or not to verify the SSL certificate of the API server. This should be True in production,
> but can be set to False for testing purposes.
>
> `follow_redirects`: Whether or not to follow redirects. Default value is False.
>
> `httpx_args`: A dictionary of additional arguments to be passed to the `httpx.Client` and `httpx.AsyncClient` constructor.

Attributes:

: raise_on_unexpected_status: Whether or not to raise an errors.UnexpectedStatus if the API returns a

  : status code that was not documented in the source OpenAPI document. Can also be provided as a keyword
    argument to the constructor.

  token: The token to use for authentication
  prefix: The prefix to use for the Authorization header
  auth_header_name: The name of the Authorization header

modules.name: fishjam.api._fishjam_client
documentation: Fishjam client used to manage rooms

class_variables.name: fishjam.api._fishjam_client.RoomOptions.max_peers
documentation: Maximum amount of peers allowed into the room

class_variables.name: fishjam.api._fishjam_client.RoomOptions.peer_disconnected_timeout
documentation:
Duration (in seconds) after which the peer will be removed if it is disconnected.
If not provided, this feature is disabled.

class_variables.name: fishjam.api._fishjam_client.RoomOptions.peerless_purge_timeout
documentation:
Duration (in seconds) after which the room will be removed 
if no peers are connected. If not provided, this feature is disabled.

class_variables.name: fishjam.api._fishjam_client.RoomOptions.room_id
documentation:
Custom id used for identifying room within Fishjam.
Must be unique across all rooms. If not provided, random UUID is generated.

class_variables.name: fishjam.api._fishjam_client.RoomOptions.video_codec
documentation: Enforces video codec for each peer in the room

class_variables.name: fishjam.api._fishjam_client.RoomOptions.webhook_url
documentation: URL where Fishjam notifications will be sent

class_variables.name: fishjam.api._fishjam_client.PeerOptions.enable_simulcast
documentation: Enables the peer to use simulcast

methods.name: fishjam.api._fishjam_client.FishjamClient.__init__
documentation: Create FishjamClient instance, providing the fishjam url and managment token.

methods.name: fishjam.api._fishjam_client.FishjamClient.create_peer
documentation:
Creates peer in the room

Returns a tuple (`Peer`, `PeerToken`) - the token is needed by Peer
to authenticate to Fishjam.

The possible options to pass for peer are `PeerOptions`.

methods.name: fishjam.api._fishjam_client.FishjamClient.create_room
documentation:
Creates a new room
Returns the created `Room`

methods.name: fishjam.api._fishjam_client.FishjamClient.get_room
documentation: Returns room with the given id
